summary: iter220 Live Camera Pan-Speed Detection + Desktop Capture Hub Redesign. All features tested and working. Desktop: LaunchOnMobileCard with QR code (qrserver.com), URL, copy/open/toggle buttons, 8-tile grid with MOBILE pills on mobile-only tiles. Mobile: Live camera overlay mounts correctly, shows 'Camera unavailable' error in headless (expected), pan-badge with motion source indicator present. Backend regression: all 3 /api/waste/* endpoints return 200 OK.
critical_code_review_comments: waste-video.ts: attachPanGuidance correctly implements dual-source motion detection (IMU + optical flow). Optical flow runs unconditionally at 7Hz on 64x48 downsampled frames. IMU binds in parallel and takes precedence if events fire within 1500ms.
WasteTab.tsx: LiveCameraOverlay correctly handles getUserMedia errors, shows 'Camera unavailable' card with helpful message. Pan-badge shows motion source (IMU/FLOW/—).

EchoWastePanel.tsx: LaunchOnMobileCard well-implemented with QR via api.qrserver.com, copy-link with '✓ Copied' feedback, open-new-tab with target=_blank, enlarge toggle. 8-tile CaptureCard grid with muted prop for mobile-only tiles that scroll to launch card on click.
test_credentials: No auth required for /api/waste/*. Use ?devAuth=1 for frontend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter220 fully tested. New features: (1) Desktop Capture Hub has LaunchOnMobileCard at top with QR code, URL, copy/open/toggle buttons. (2) 8-tile grid replaces 3-tile layout - 3 active (video/still/voice) + 5 mobile-only with MOBILE pill. (3) Mobile live camera overlay shows pan-speed badge with motion source (IMU/FLOW). (4) Optical flow detection runs at 7Hz on 64x48 frames, IMU takes precedence if available. All backend /api/waste/* endpoints working.
